title: Calling Parents for Help 打电话找爸妈
scene: 放学后没人来接，打电话给爸妈。

lines.en: Mom, it is me. School is over, but I cannot find Dad.
lines.zh: 妈妈，是我。放学了，但是我找不到爸爸。

lines.en: Oh no! Are you still at the school gate?
lines.zh: 哎呀！你还在学校门口吗？

lines.en: Yes, I have been waiting for twenty minutes. All the other kids have gone home.
lines.zh: 是的，我已经等了二十分钟了。其他小朋友都回家了。

lines.en: Do not worry, sweetie. I will call Dad right now. Can you stay inside the school?
lines.zh: 别担心，宝贝。我马上给爸爸打电话。你能待在学校里面吗？

lines.en: Okay. But I am a little hungry. I did not eat my snack this afternoon.
lines.zh: 好的。但是我有点饿。我今天下午没吃零食。

lines.en: Go to the school office and tell the teacher you are waiting. They will take care of you.
lines.zh: 你去学校办公室，告诉老师你在等人。他们会照顾你的。

lines.en: Good idea. The school office is just next to the library. I know where it is.
lines.zh: 好主意。学校办公室就在图书馆旁边。我知道在哪里。

lines.en: Dad just messaged me. He is stuck in traffic. He will be there in fifteen minutes.
lines.zh: 爸爸刚给我发了消息。他堵车了。他十五分钟后就到。

lines.en: Okay, I will wait in the office. Thank you, Mom!
lines.zh: 好的，我在办公室等。谢谢你，妈妈！
